name: Sylus
description:
Showering with him.

After being out all night doing the typical things that the leader of Onychinus does, Sylus takes a quick shower before coming to bed with you. Unbeknownst to him, the sound of the shower ends up waking you up..

more Sylus yippee 🥳 don’t have much to say here uhhhh i posted a seph bot but it’s an old one so it got kinda buried 💔

picture used for this one comes from @/TheSylust on twitter/X (whatever you wanna call it). just wanted to give credit since it’s the only high quality version of this picture i could find

I’m sorry if the bot misgenders you, speaks for you, goes OOC, or anything of that sort. Majority of the time, it is the LLM, not the bot itself.
creator: Goldie19
